task: Migrate the sign-in and registration-request pages to Nunjucks and fold them into the GOV.UK page publisher and catalogue.
decisions: Register two Nunjucks templates behind the existing publishGovukPages interface.
Delete the legacy post-build normaliser and its package and workflow hooks.
Replace filesystem-backed legacy page assertions with the in-memory publisher fixture.
Preserve the established sign-in Flux page key through catalogue context.
testContractImpactSweep: publisher route count and byte parity
validation: targeted publisher and affected route-state tests: 10 passed
npm run lint: passed with existing warnings only
repeat publisher build changed only the two intended outputs
residualRisks: Generated output diffs include canonical publisher formatting and shared-layout assets.
The registration-request page replaces legacy one-off chrome with the shared ResearchOps layout.
